title: Disconnect deleted and archived boards
excerpt:
Cleanup of a high level board is really difficult when you can’t disconnect archived and deleted boards. 
An account admin needs to go find where it was deleted or archived (it doesn’t tell you).

posts.author: rcalkins (Russell Calkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screen Shot 2022-08-15 at 12.50.56 PM880×372 54.6 KB

Cleanup of a high level board is really difficult when you can’t disconnect archived and deleted boards.

An account admin needs to go find where it was deleted or archived (it doesn’t tell you).
